title: nigella damascena subsp. minor
intro: Nigella damascena subsp. minor, also known as Roman coriander or black cumin, is a flowering plant species in the family Ranunculaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Nigella damascena subsp. minor include oil, seeds, and powder, which can be used in cooking, as a supplement, or in traditional medicine to reap its benefits.
